title: Server Receipt
description: A server receipt returned after a successful record-chain submission.

server_receipt_id.description: Unique receipt identifier in the format rcg-YYYYMMDD-<12hex>.

gateway_version.description: Semver of the gateway that produced this receipt.

submission_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the canonical submission JSON.

accepted_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the submission was accepted.

file_path.description: Repository-relative path where the record was persisted.

commit_sha.description: Git commit SHA of the persist operation.

receipt_sha256.description: SHA-256 of the receipt contents (self-referencing integrity hash).
